tools.name: get_service_info
tools.description: What StarReview does, pricing (CHF 0.50 per published reply, drafting is free), how a business signs up, and how an agent gets an authenticated token.

tools.name: search_business
tools.description: Find a business on Google Maps by name, optionally with its city. Returns up to 5 candidates; feed the chosen candidate's placeId to check_response_rate.

tools.name: check_response_rate
tools.description: Free check: what share of this business's recent Google reviews received an owner reply, benchmarked against up to two nearby competitors. placeId must come from a recent search_business call. Results are cached for about 30 days; do not repeat the call for the same place.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp.starreview.ch" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_business, check_response_rate · Private data: get_service_info · Public sink: check_response_rate.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_business, check_response_rate · Private data: get_service_info · Public sink: check_response_rate

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
